_about: Product Builder registry — the single source of truth the build loop edits. prototype.html renders from this file (a thin adapter maps it onto the in-memory PB_DATA shape the render machinery reads). DATA ONLY — render bodies live as real .js files (render/components/<id>.js, render/screens/<id>.js) referenced by each entry's renderSrc; render.py compiles them at /pb:build --render. Schema is documented in prototype-builder.md.
